creator: michiel@vanbaak.eu
text:
Created attachment 254536
0001-net-p2p-autopulse-New-port-autopulse-v1.0.1-Scan-Mul.patch

Thanks for the review, I updated the patch to address the comments:

- GH_TAGNAME is now derived from DISTVERSIONPREFIX and DISTVERSION
- Use OPT_* variables instead of if statements to set options
- Updated pkg-descr to be sentences and added some extra info

poudriere ok
Runs as test on my setup.
The changes did not effect the final binary, which is expected and another pointer the changes are good :)
